description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a slightly tapered top and bottom, featuring a pull tab on the top for opening. The can is predominantly silver-gray with horizontal ridges and a large, bold black script across the front, accompanied by smaller Japanese and English text in black and red. The front label includes a prominent hexagonal white panel with detailed product information and decorative accents. The can's surface is smooth and metallic, with no visible condensation or wetness. The top of the can is embossed with additional branding and a standard pull tab mechanism. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on clarity and legibility.
description: A tall, silver-gray aluminum beer can with bold black and red text, a hexagonal white label, and a pull tab on top. The design is clean, modern, and highly legible.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with large black script, red and black text, and a hexagonal white panel with detailed information.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the edge of the main label and the continuation of the horizontal ridges, with less visible text.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain metallic surface with horizontal ridges and no visible label or text.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side of the label and the can's smooth, metallic finish, with partial text visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, modern design with a large black script, red accents, and a hexagonal white panel for product details. The typography is clear and prominent, with minimalistic decorative elements and a metallic background.
